title: Business learns that it must have a privacy policy available to the public
summary: An individual wrote to a business requesting his personal information, as well as a copy of its privacy policy. He complained that the organization not only withheld some of his personal information, but also its privacy policy. The complainant was initially told by the business that he was not entitled to any of his information that pre-...
dedupKey: business learns that it must have a privacy policy available to the public|2006-03-06
